highest place
in a medical institution. She is religious minded, charitable in nature and
beautiful. Raja Yogawill bless her life. 26th and 27th and again 30th and 31st
years indicate higher studies. She will earn fame and honour from Govern
ment. Her partner will be highly educated, and will be an intellectual working
in a Treasury. As the second house from Mercury and Mars is that ofVenus,
and there is the Moon in the 3rd, the partner will earn in several ways. She
will have 2 sons and a daughter. She willlive.upto 58 to 63 years as Jupiter
is aspected by an inimical Venus.
CHART 75
The native will be good to look
at, of excellent character and highly
intellectual. He will occupy a high
position in new environment. It will be
Dh.
a religious institution as Saturn is Moon
Mars
conjunct with Jupiter and Ketu; both
Jupt
interested in religion. As there is the
Sat.
Moon in the 2nd house to Saturn, the Dt.
native will have friends dealing in
Mer.
